publishingInformation.name: jellyfin

de-DE.name: Jellyfin
examplePhrases: Alexa, frage Jellyfin, meine Lieblingsmusik abzuspielen
Alexa, frage Jellyfin, Lied von Kuenstler abzuspielen
Alexa, frage Jellyfin, meine Playlist Beste Musik abzuspielen
de-DE.description:
Spiele Medien von deinem Jellyfin-Server ab.

Source: https://github.com/infinityofspace/jellyfin-alexa-plugin

en-AU.name: Jellyfin
en-AU.summary: Play media from your Jellyfin server
examplePhrases: Alexa ask jellyfin play my favourite music
Alexa ask jellyfin play songs from Artist
Alexa ask jellyfin play my playlist Best Music
en-AU.description:
Play media from your Jellyfin server.

Source: https://github.com/infinityofspace/jellyfin-alexa-plugin

es-ES.name: Jellyfin

Alexa pide a jellyfin que reproduzca mi lista Mejor Musica

it-IT.name: Jellyfin
it-IT.summary: Riproduci i contenuti dal tuo server Jellyfin
examplePhrases: Alexa chiedi a jellyfin di riprodurre la mia musica preferita
Alexa chiedi a jellyfin di riprodurre brani di Artista
Alexa chiedi a jellyfin di riprodurre la mia playlist Miglior Musica

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa ask jellyfin play my favorite music' or 'Alexa ask jellyfin what's playing'
